CustomField.description: Phase 2.2 — number of top-volume prompts that get a SAMPLED acceptance rate via a bounded Request→Response→Generation→Feedback chain walk. Tail prompts (rank > N) keep the cheaper feature-correlation path. Tune down on busy orgs that brush against the 100-SOQL transaction limit; tune up if customers want SAMPLED coverage on more prompts. 0 disables sampling and reverts everything to CORRELATED.
CustomField.label: Top N Prompt Acceptance Sample
